[At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to make a donation. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Loading...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/QLYumsMmmsX8mSDxGSuNpCT4_RV5aabTpCjD68RZem4=/d4MBBDp8qd6BumH16E4zbGYrCfn3c3aKD8rnDy1-R5Q=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190817-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)
Peter, Lack of broadband access hinders opportunity across our rural communities.

When Adam and I decided to move "home" five years ago, we easily moved back to Henrico County, hooked up the internet, and he was immediately back to work telecommuting. We became homeowners, taxpayers, and active community members in our hometown. But what if we had been from Louisa or Nottoway or the counties I serve without reliable access to internet?

This is a simple story, but it's one that demonstrates how access to broadband affects families' decisions on where to live and work.

Lack of broadband increases the "homework gap" for our region's children. It hinders our farmers and producers' ability to use current farming technologies. It makes it hard to attract businesses and grow those founded in our rural areas. It makes telemedicine technologies unusable, and it hinders growth and opportunity.

Ensuring broadband reaches our rural communities will have a direct impact on the residents of Virginia's 7th district, and it's why I've been working on this issue since I arrived in Congress.
| | | [ CONTRIBUTE >> ](https://act.myngp.com/el/QLYumsMmmsX8mSDxGSuNpCT4_RV5aabTpCjD68RZem4=/d4MBBDp8qd6BumH16E4zbGYrCfn3c3aKD8rnDy1-R5Q=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190817-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)
---
Last month, an amendment I authored to increase funding to the USDA's ReConnect program passed on the House Floor with sweeping bipartisan support, 408-22! In our district, and across the country, rural communities will benefit because of increased access to this vital funding.

This issue is important to me because it's important to those I represent. I hope you'll support me in this fight by contributing to my re-election fund. [_**Please contribute what you can to help us continue supporting Virginia and our rural communities in Congress.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/QLYumsMmmsX8mSDxGSuNpCT4_RV5aabTpCjD68RZem4=/d4MBBDp8qd6BumH16E4zbGYrCfn3c3aKD8rnDy1-R5Q=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190817-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)

We got some disturbing news about the Trump Campaign's efforts to target Virginia that I need to share with you. **The Trump campaign has begun deploying its operatives across the Commonwealth as part of the "Trump Victory Initiative."** Their goal is simple: develop a grassroots organization that can beat Mark Warner and re-elect Donald Trump in 2020.

body:
| | Peter, Did you see the movie _Unplanned_ in theaters last spring? If you missed it, I’ve got good news! [It’s now available on DVD, BLU-RAY, and Digital Download](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=AF_BemlRPBVi7UFptHbSS9I1UEC0dow1J5fzfnBy219vxUly_Un5HCtuPOk_nc8N&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190817com01&n=1). _Unplanned_ is the inspiring and eye-opening true story of Abby Johnson and her journey of transformation. She was one of the youngest Planned Parenthood Clinic Directors in the nation, overseeing 20,000 abortions during her tenure. But when she witnessed an ultrasound-guided abortion, everything changed. **My Faith Votes is proud to share the message of _Unplanned_ as an affiliate partner. We also serve as the film’s technology partner, directing viewers to tangible ways to take action or receive support through pregnancy counseling, abortion healing, and resources for abortion workers.** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=AF_BemlRPBVi7UFptHbSS9I1UEC0dow1J5fzfnBy219vxUly_Un5HCtuPOk_nc8N&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190817com01&n=2) See the movie that is changing lives and influencing the conversation about abortion all over the world. Share the movie that is a living example of love, hope, and redemption. Get your copy today! [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=AF_BemlRPBVi7UFptHbSS9I1UEC0dow1J5fzfnBy219vxUly_Un5HCtuPOk_nc8N&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190817com01&n=3) Thank you for standing for the sanctity of life. By watching _Unplanned_ , you can know how to pray for a culture of life, be more informed on the issue, and take action to make abortion unthinkable. **Pray. Think. Vote.** Megan West
Media Director

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Disgusted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
I’ve spent the last 24-hours in Mississippi following one of the worst ICE raids in the history of this country.
#
I’ve spent the last 24-hours in Mississippi following one of the worst ICE raids in the history of this country.
Here’s what I saw.
In Canton, a small community about a half hour outside of Jackson, I met with about 25 women, a couple of men and their very young children. The women are undocumented. Most of the kids are U.S. citizens. Their husbands were all apprehended in the ICE raid and they now have no idea when or if they are going to see them again. They also don’t know how they’re going to pay the rent, afford an attorney, or pay for school supplies. Of those needs, money for rent is most important. All of them mentioned it repeatedly.
An amazing local store owner seems to be the hub of the immigrant community — everyone trusts her, everyone looks to her for help. It was in her store that I met with the affected families.
One woman, wearing an ankle monitor or _grillete_ said to me, “We have never been a burden. Some people claim that immigrants take public services. I’ve never taken assistance or help in my life. I came here to work, and every day I work. My husband works the night shift, I work the day shift. Now that he’s detained and I’m not working, I have nothing, no way to support my family. I don’t want anyone’s help, I just want to work.”
A young woman, 18 years old, told me about her parents. She told me that they luckily both left the chicken processing plant just before the raid took place. She started to cry when she told me that they are still working, because they have no other choice. She told me she was crying because she doesn’t know if one day when she’s at school she’ll come home to find that they’re gone. They’ve lived here and worked here for her whole life, they’ve raised a strong, smart, caring woman — a U.S. citizen, someone who should be able to focus on her studies, her career, her future instead of worrying about whether her parents will be deported for the crime of working in a chicken processing plant for $12 an hour.
Nearly 700 families were broken up in these raids. Hardworking, family-focused people.
I went to the home of a young woman who lived on the outskirts of town. She used to sell tamales to the workers at the chicken processing plant. She arrived in this country four years ago seeking asylum, and has been wearing an ankle monitor ever since. It’s heavy, gets hot, irritates her skin, but she’s had it on every day for four years. She’s raising four beautiful children, the oldest of which sometimes helps her to sell tamales. Now that that the immigrants have been rounded up and are no longer working in the chicken processing plants there’s no one to buy the tamales.
She’s worried that she’ll be deported back to Guatemala or, with no income and no ability to pay the rent, that she will have no other choice but to return. She showed us her scars from stab wounds she suffered when she lived there, and said she had received a call recently from a gang leader in Guatemala who told her that her husband had been murdered for outstanding debts and that the gang wanted her children as additional payment. She is certain that if she returns she will lose them.
We went to a Catholic church in Forest that was providing help for families torn apart by these recent raids. In addition to the priest and nuns who were tending to the children, there were a number of attorneys from Arizona who had flown in to provide free legal help to the families. They were also helping to take care of the kids. People willing to do this work are my heroes. It doesn’t pay, it’s tough mentally, it’s tough emotionally, but it is so necessary.
One of the families they were helping was really struggling. I met a dad of a four-month old and a very sweet, polite 11-year old. The father told me that his wife was picked up in the raid and that she is having a hard time in detention. She is depressed, and her breasts are painful and swollen, as she was still breast-feeding when she was picked up. She can’t bond out — I don’t think they’ve even set bond for these families.
I met another woman at the church. She was in detention for the last week and was only released yesterday when ICE realized that they had also detained her husband at another facility, leaving her children on their own without either parent. She told me about the conditions in the facility, the depression that she felt while she was there, missing her family, not knowing how they were doing. She talked about the day of the raid, one of her co-workers punched in the face by an agent (“he was scared and he started to run, so they ran him down and punched him”). She talked about workers being cuffed and their cuffs tied to ankle restraints, like you’d tie a hog. I asked her how she felt now. She told me “I’m just happy to be with my son. That’s the only thing that matters to me.”
This cruelty, this terror felt by this community of hardworking immigrants, is the policy of Donald Trump. His hope is that he can inflict enough suffering for these immigrants to get them to leave, or perhaps go back to the countries they fled in the first place. He’s trying to show he’s tough by preying upon the vulnerable and the defenseless.
I came to see it for myself. I am disgusted that we could treat people like this in a country of immigrants. But I’m inspired by the way that people have come together to help these families.
My hope is that the more America learns about this the more we as Americans will do to change this. As hard as this is to see, I’m glad I came here — glad to be able to bear witness to what is being done in our name to immigrants in this country. And I’m more determined than ever to help lift up the stories of those who are suffering, and the stories of those who are rising up to meet this moment.
If you’re wondering what you can do, please make a donation to the Mississippi Immigrant Rights Alliance. Here’s the link:
[**https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26296?t=2 &akid;=49476%2E444211%2EDQ0_1K**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26296?t=1&akid=49476%2E444211%2EDQ0_1K)
\- Beto

But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). body:

It's been a busy summer. We cheered on Elizabeth in two debates, put up a Grassroots Donor Wall, and held barnstorms, house parties, and volunteer trainings all over the country.

We're proud of the work this movement has put in -- and excited to do so much more.

**It's important that your voice is front and center in this campaign, so as we gear up for the fall, Elizabeth wants to hear from you -- not from powerful special interests, Washington lobbyists, or deep-pocketed donors.**

**[Fill out this survey today to say what issues are on your mind-- and let Elizabeth know what we should be focusing on for the fall and beyond.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285297e3/45c30650/129f1b7bd/6685320d/2713646984/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUk0MlBfRUdGX0lTU19DXzIwMTkwODE3X1YxUzNfUF9UMSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrenissuessurvey?source=EMI42P_EGF_ISS_C_20190817_V1S3_P_T1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

When we're criss-crossing the country talking with volunteers and voters, we're learning about the issues that hit home in their communities.

But we want to continue the conversation in every way possible.

**That's why we're asking you today -- what issues have you been thinking about lately? What would you like to see Elizabeth tackle?**

name: Dan Baer
subject: RE: Mitch McConnell just blocked:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Mitch McConnell is actively allowing hackers to infiltrate our elections.
|
---

| | I just heard election experts deliver us a sharp warning:

Mitch McConnell is actively allowing hackers to infiltrate our elections.

[**I 'm asking you to sign my emergency petition before midnight and demand Mitch McConnell take up House Democrats' election security bill for a vote. We can't stand idly by here -- and if we get 1,000 signatures before midnight, I'll personally deliver your signature to McConnell. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8279d/232dfd1/9f05c94/62a13f27/2902239547/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/mcconnell-election-security-petition?source=20190817_em_pet_b1_baer_all")

Our democracy is in crisis.

Robert Mueller just confirmed that Russians are infiltrating our elections as we speak.

And last weekend, professional hackers demonstrated exactly how to breach voting machines.

But Mitch McConnell is deliberately blocking a bill that would safeguard our elections and protect our democracy:

**Because corporate voting machine lobbyists write McConnell massive checks, and because a hacked election would benefit Republicans.**

They can't win when the rules are fair so they're rigging the system so they can win.

Let me be clear.

Mitch McConnell is putting the very foundation of our democracy at stake.

I won't let him get away with it. Will you stand with me?

**[I need an overwhelming response on my petition before midnight to demand McConnell bring House Democrats' election security bill for a vote. Can I count on you? >>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8279d/232dfd1/9f05c94/62a13f27/2902239547/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/mcconnell-election-security-petition?source=20190817_em_pet_b1_baer_all")**

Thank you, Dan

|
---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8279d/232dfd1/9f05c94/62a13f24/2902239547/VEsF/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8279d/232dfd1/9f05c94/62a13f25/2902239547/VEsC/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but it's because we're running a grassroots campaign and rejecting corporate PAC money. We need your help to win -- and grassroots donations like yours truly make the difference. | | [**DONATE**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8279d/232dfd1/9f05c94/62a13f2a/2902239547/VEsD/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

We hope you'll consider sticking with us long-term. But if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8279d/232dfd1/9f05c94/62a13f28/2902239547/VEsB/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/unsubscribe").

Why Bill's appearance on the Daily Show this week is a must-watch.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21f22/1630b3eb/510ab0df/5f554479/3541368941/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwNiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_dailyshow?refcode=706_org_em_fr")
Friend --
Did you see Bill on the Daily Show this week? It's a must-watch.
In the interview, Bill talks about his proven commitment to working people -- but he also discusses something you may not have heard him talk about before: his father's suicide. Bill discussed how it informed his approach to mental health care and overseeing the largest police force in the nation.
**[Watch Bill's interview on the Daily Show now](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21f22/1630b3eb/510ab0df/5f554478/3541368941/VEsE/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://www.facebook.com/bill.deblasio/posts/2392335334193735")**, then **[contribute $1 to help power this campaign:](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21f22/1630b3eb/510ab0df/5f554479/3541368941/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwNiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_dailyshow?refcode=706_org_em_fr")**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21f22/1630b3eb/510ab0df/5f554478/3541368941/VEsC/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://www.facebook.com/bill.deblasio/posts/2392335334193735")
As Bill told Trevor Noah, so much of what we need to do for New York City and for this country can only be done in Washington -- that's what motivated Bill to run for president. And everyone should be able to share in the type of things he's accomplished for New York City: free pre-K for every child, a $15 minimum wage, paid sick leave and so much more.
**[Find out more about what Bill told Trevor Noah on The Daily Show this week](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21f22/1630b3eb/510ab0df/5f554478/3541368941/VEsD/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://www.facebook.com/bill.deblasio/posts/2392335334193735"),** and **[contribute $1 to help keep Bill in the race.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21f22/1630b3eb/510ab0df/5f554479/3541368941/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwNiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_dailyshow?refcode=706_org_em_fr")**
It's time to prioritize working people and we all know Bill has the bold voice and the proven record to do that. Let's help him keep fighting.
Thanks for watching,
Team de Blasio

Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are putting the security of the 2020 election at grave risk.

They refuse to take any action to defend our democracy from foreign interference.

[**I 'm rolling out a multi-step election security plan that I will enact as your next president.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac53/134673f2/d724da8/69964a82/3540412960/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**FIRST:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac53/134673f2/d724da8/69964a82/3540412960/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") Secure our elections. My plan raises standards and increases resources to protect every precinct in America with new voting machines, mandatory audits, improved election procedures, and stronger cybersecurity.

[**SECOND:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac53/134673f2/d724da8/69964a82/3540412960/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") Fight foreign interference. By closing campaign finance loopholes that allow foreign actors to distort our media, elections, and campaigns, we can fight back against interference.

[**THIRD:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac53/134673f2/d724da8/69964a82/3540412960/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") Start a dialogue. We will open a dialogue with the American people about ongoing threats to our democracy and steps our government is taking to protect it. Foreign adversaries want to undermine the public's faith in democracy; we must restore it.

[**FINALLY:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac53/134673f2/d724da8/69964a82/3540412960/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") Reclaim our respect. We will reclaim America's historic leadership role by mobilizing our allies to push back against threats to democracy worldwide. We will work with our partners in Europe, NATO, and elsewhere to respond forcefully to those attacking democracy, strengthen election security, and support civil society.

[**Democracy is under attack at home and across the globe. We must rise in its defense.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac53/134673f2/d724da8/69964a82/3540412960/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Trump and McConnell's inaction is damaging the integrity of our election system and the future of our democracy.

[**We can 't allow this to continue. You can read my election security plan here.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac53/134673f2/d724da8/69964a81/3540412960/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/electionsecurity")

Thanks for standing with me.

Michael

subject: Honestly, we’re flabbergasted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Steve King just attacked Beto on Twitter. Can you help us respond?
#
Steve King is Congress’ most out-in-the-open bigot. He’s well known for embracing the term “white supremacist.” This week, he told a packed club in Iowa that without “rape and incest... would there be any population left?”
Fortunately, King has a viable Democratic challenger running against him, Beto’s good friend JD Scholten. When Beto tweeted out some support for JD, Steve King fired back:
We can’t rid ourselves of bigotry and sexism without taking on the Steve Kings and Donald Trumps of the world. So today we’re doing a fundraising drive to raise as much money as we can for JD’s campaign to defeat Steve King, and Beto’s campaign to defeat Donald Trump.
[Can you make a $3 contribution to take on Steve King and Donald Trump? Your contributions are especially important in light of his attacks on Beto.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26310?refcode=ema20190817-49477&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=49477%2E444211%2EYXxwxZ)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26310?refcode=ema20190817-49477&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=49477%2E444211%2EYXxwxZ)**
JD Scholten can beat Steve King. Beto can beat Donald Trump. Our national politics doesn’t have to be this way.
It’s on us to make that change, and we can start by raising as much money as possible today. [Make a $3 donation to JD Scholten and Beto right now.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26310?refcode=ema20190817-49477&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=49477%2E444211%2EYXxwxZ)
Thanks for participating today,
Team Beto

name: Team Weld
subject: give voters a choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARyfJI-XMBZhQWSi2vsmLew1&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190817_fr&n=1) Friend — One of the worst things about President Trump is that when he says something crazy, you just know he actually believes it. **That’s what makes his ‘you have no choice but to vote for me’ quip to New Hampshire voters so damning.** Bill put it best on Twitter: [](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARyfJI-XMBZhQWSi2vsmLew1&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190817_fr&n=2) The problem with Trump's statement is that it’s wrong (as usual) and shows he clearly knows NOTHING about New Hampshire voters. _**They take their first in the nation primary status seriously, and they are pretty good at making up their own minds.**_ That’s why we’re working hard on the ground to make sure voters in New Hampshire — and everywhere — know that Bill’s running and about our plan to reclaim the Republican Party. We trust the voters, and we know that if they hear our message they’ll be able to make up their own minds about who to vote for. This is why we need your help.
